programmes.show_description: Epic adventure. A Viking prince is sent on a dangerous quest by the dying king to find his exiled older brother and persuade him to return home to defend their father's kingdom from invasion. (2013)
Nautical drama with Adam Baldwin. Disaster strikes at sea when a luxury liner is capsized by a terrorist bomb, uniting a group of strangers in a struggle to survive.  S1, Ep2(2005)
A blindingly bright meteor crashes into the Plateau and when Marguerite, Challenger and Roxton go to investigate they discover a frozen woman. S3, Ep11/22
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Fantasy horror from Hammer. Passengers travelling on a dilapidated steamer find themselves marooned on a misty sea, surrounded by killer seaweed, murderous crustaceans and Spanish pirates. (1968)
